brand.name: Green Empire Landscaping
brand.tagline: Long Island's Premier Landscaping & Outdoor Renovation
brand.footerTagline: Long Island's landscaping & outdoor renovation specialists. Certified, insured, and locally based.
brand.heroSubtext: Your outdoor space should be built to the same standard as your home — designed around your vision, not a template. Custom landscapes, patios, pavers, driveways, and outdoor living environments built to last.
brand.servicesHeadline: Complete Landscaping Services for Long Island

services.name: Back Yard Landscaping
services.description: Transform your back yard into a private retreat — custom plantings, beds, and gathering spaces designed for relaxation and built around your lifestyle.
services.heroText: Your back yard should be a space you actually want to spend time in. Green Empire designs and installs custom back yard landscapes for Long Island homeowners — built to look stunning and last for years.

services.name: Front Yard Landscaping
services.description: Make a strong first impression with a professionally landscaped entrance that reflects your home's character — and makes it stand out on the block.
services.heroText: Curb appeal is the first thing anyone notices. Green Empire creates polished, well-designed front yard landscapes that make Long Island homes stand out on the block.
bullets: Custom planting and garden bed design

services.name: Paver Installation
services.description: Premium outdoor surfaces for walkways, patios, and pool decks — precision installation with lasting durability, built for Long Island's climate.
services.heroText: Pavers done right — from design to final seal. Green Empire installs premium paver systems across Long Island with craftsmanship and materials that stand the test of time.
bullets: Polymeric sand finishing and professional sealing

services.name: Driveway Installation
services.description: Functional yet stunning — driveways designed to enhance your home's curb appeal while standing up to Long Island's climate for years to come.
services.heroText: Your driveway sets the tone before anyone reaches your front door. Green Empire installs custom driveways that blend seamlessly with your landscape and elevate your property's value.

services.name: Patio Installation
services.description: Extend your living space outdoors with a thoughtfully designed patio — built for entertaining, everyday enjoyment, and lasting value.
services.heroText: A well-designed patio changes how you experience your property. Green Empire creates custom patios for Long Island homeowners who want beauty, functionality, and durability in equal measure.
bullets: Custom patio design and layout planning
Outdoor kitchen and fire feature prep

services.name: Outdoor Living Spaces
services.description: Complete outdoor living environments — pergolas, fire features, outdoor kitchens, and custom seating areas. Designed for the way Long Island families actually live.
services.heroText: Outdoor living is more than a trend — it's a lifestyle. Green Empire designs and builds complete outdoor environments that become the most-used space on your property.
bullets: Fire pit and outdoor fireplace builds

services.name: Landscape Design & Installation
services.description: Full-service landscape design from concept to completion. A cohesive design process that transforms your property's potential into a polished, finished reality.
services.heroText: Great outdoor spaces start with great design. Green Empire's landscape designers develop comprehensive plans for Long Island properties — then execute every detail with precision.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: Green Empire completely transformed our backyard. They designed a beautiful patio and renovated our entire landscape from scratch. The crew was professional, detail-oriented, and left everything immaculate. Exactly the quality we were looking for.

reviews.name: Sandra K.
reviews.text: We hired Green Empire for a full front yard redesign and couldn't be happier with the result. The design consultation was thorough, the installation was flawless, and the finished product completely elevated our home's curb appeal.

reviews.name: Robert A.
reviews.text: Green Empire built us a stunning outdoor living space — custom patio, pergola, and fire pit area. The attention to detail was impressive from start to finish. It's become the spot where we spend all our time.

faqs.q: What areas of Long Island do you serve?
faqs.a: We serve Nassau and Suffolk Counties, including Hempstead, Garden City, Great Neck, Hicksville, Levittown, Massapequa, Huntington, Babylon, Islip, Smithtown, and 15+ more communities. Not sure if we cover your area? Call or text us at (516) 774-2956.

faqs.q: How do I get a free estimate?
faqs.a: Call or text us at (516) 774-2956, or fill out the estimate form on our website. We'll get back to you within 1 business hour to schedule a free on-site consultation. No pressure, no obligation.
Yes. Green Empire Landscaping is fully certified and insured in New York State. We carry comprehensive liability insurance and workers' compensation coverage on every project.

faqs.q: What types of projects do you specialize in?
faqs.a: We specialize in outdoor renovation and landscaping — back yard and front yard transformations, paver installation, driveway installation, patio builds, outdoor living spaces, and full landscape design and installation. Every project is custom.

faqs.q: What's the best time to start a landscaping project?
faqs.a: Spring and fall are our most popular seasons for design and installation projects. That said, we work year-round on Long Island. We recommend scheduling a consultation at least 2–3 weeks before you'd like to start.

faqs.q: How long does a typical project take?
faqs.a: Project timelines vary by scope. A patio or paver installation typically takes 3–7 days. Full landscape renovations may take 1–3 weeks. We'll give you a clear timeline during your consultation before any work begins.

faqs.q: Do you offer a design consultation before starting?
faqs.a: Yes — every project starts with a free on-site consultation. We walk the property, discuss your vision, and develop a plan before anything is quoted or scheduled. We want to make sure the result is exactly what you had in mind.
